products.ProductTitle: OpenTech Military-Grade Tempered Glass Screen Protector Compatible For Iphone 13 Mini
products.Description: Protect your iPhone 13 Mini with our military-grade tempered glass. Features 9H hardness, anti-scratch coating, and crystal clear clarity for the ultimate viewing experience.

products.ProductTitle: Mobile Stand Foldable & 360° Rotatable Mobile Stand
products.Description: This mobile stand holder is compatible with a wide range of devices, allowing you to comfortably view your screen at various angles.

products.ProductTitle: Spigen Wireless Charger for iPhone 17/16/15/13/12/11 Series, Samsung Galaxy S25/S24/S23/S22/S21/S20, OnePlus with USB-A to C Cable - Black
products.Description: Fast wireless charging up to 15W for compatible devices. Qi-certified for safe charging with built-in temperature control and overcharge protection.

products.ProductTitle: Silicone Shockproof Phone Case for Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra - Transparent
products.Description: Premium silicone case with military-grade drop protection. Raised edges protect camera and screen. Ultra-clear design shows off your phone's original color.

products.ProductTitle: USB-C Fast Charging Cable 3-Pack (6ft) - Braided Nylon
products.Description: Durable braided nylon cables with reinforced connectors. Supports fast charging up to 60W and data transfer speeds up to 480Mbps. Compatible with all USB-C devices.

products.ProductTitle: 20000mAh Power Bank with Dual USB Ports & LED Display - Black
products.Description: High-capacity portable charger with intelligent LED display showing exact battery percentage. Dual USB outputs for charging two devices simultaneously. Fast charging support.

products.ProductTitle: Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds with Charging Case - TWS 5.3
products.Description: True wireless stereo earbuds with latest Bluetooth 5.3 technology. 30-hour total playtime with charging case. IPX7 waterproof rating and touch controls.

products.ProductTitle: Car Phone Holder Mount - Dashboard & Windshield Compatible
products.Description: Universal car mount with strong suction cup and adjustable arm. 360-degree rotation for perfect viewing angle. Compatible with all phone sizes 4-7 inches.

products.ProductTitle: PopSocket Grip & Stand - Marble Design
products.Description: Collapsible grip and stand for phones and tablets. Secure grip for texting, calling, photos, and selfies. Repositionable and sticks to most devices and cases.

products.ProductTitle: Privacy Screen Protector for iPhone 15 Pro Max - Anti-Spy Tempered Glass
products.Description: Advanced privacy protection that darkens screen when viewed from sides. 9H hardness tempered glass with oleophobic coating. Easy bubble-free installation.

products.ProductTitle: 65W GaN Fast Charger with 3 Ports (2 USB-C + 1 USB-A) - Compact Design
products.Description: Ultra-compact GaN technology charger. Charge laptop, tablet, and phone simultaneously. Intelligent power distribution and universal compatibility.

products.ProductTitle: Magnetic Car Phone Mount - MagSafe Compatible
products.Description: Strong magnetic mount for car air vents. MagSafe compatible for iPhone 12 and newer. Includes metal ring for non-MagSafe phones. 360-degree rotation.

products.ProductTitle: Leather Wallet Phone Case for iPhone 14 - Card Holder & Kickstand
products.Description: Premium PU leather case with 3 card slots and cash pocket. Built-in kickstand for hands-free viewing. Magnetic closure and precise cutouts.

products.ProductTitle: Selfie Ring Light with Tripod Stand - 10 Inch LED Ring
products.Description: Professional ring light with 3 color modes and 10 brightness levels. Includes phone holder and adjustable tripod. Perfect for selfies, makeup, and video calls.

products.ProductTitle: Camera Lens Protector for Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra - Tempered Glass 3-Pack
products.Description: Ultra-thin tempered glass lens protectors. Maintains photo quality while protecting from scratches. Easy installation with alignment frame included.

products.ProductTitle: Wired Earphones with Mic - Type-C Connector - Hi-Res Audio
products.Description: High-resolution audio earphones with Type-C connector. Built-in microphone and remote control. Comfortable in-ear design with multiple ear tip sizes.

products.ProductTitle: Waterproof Phone Pouch - Universal Floating Dry Bag
products.Description: IPX8 certified waterproof pouch for phones up to 7 inches. Touch-sensitive transparent windows. Perfect for swimming, boating, and beach activities.

products.ProductTitle: 3-in-1 Wireless Charging Station for Apple Devices - iPhone, AirPods, Apple Watch
products.Description: Charge all your Apple devices simultaneously. Fast wireless charging with intelligent temperature control. Sleek aluminum design with LED indicators.

products.ProductTitle: Phone Cleaning Kit - Screen Cleaner Spray & Microfiber Cloth Set
products.Description: Professional cleaning kit with alcohol-free spray solution and premium microfiber cloths. Safe for all screens and anti-reflective coatings.

products.ProductTitle: Armband Phone Holder for Running & Exercise - Adjustable & Sweatproof
products.Description: Comfortable armband for phones up to 6.7 inches. Sweatproof and lightweight design. Reflective strips for night safety. Touch-sensitive screen window.

products.ProductTitle: Bluetooth FM Transmitter for Car - USB Charger & Hands-Free Calling
products.Description: Stream music from phone to car stereo via FM radio. Dual USB charging ports. Built-in microphone for hands-free calls. LED display shows battery voltage.

products.ProductTitle: Phone Gimbal Stabilizer - 3-Axis Handheld Smartphone Stabilizer
products.Description: Professional 3-axis gimbal for smooth video recording. Face tracking and gesture control. Foldable design with 12-hour battery life. Compatible with all smartphones.

products.ProductTitle: Anti-Radiation Phone Sticker - EMF Protection Shield (5-Pack)
products.Description: Reduce electromagnetic radiation exposure from mobile devices. Ultra-thin design doesn't interfere with signal. Easy peel-and-stick application.

products.ProductTitle: USB OTG Adapter - Type-C to USB 3.0 (3-Pack)
products.Description: Connect USB devices to your Type-C phone or tablet. Supports USB flash drives, keyboards, mice, and game controllers. High-speed data transfer up to 5Gbps.

products.ProductTitle: Portable Mini Bluetooth Speaker - Waterproof & Wireless
products.Description: Compact wireless speaker with 360-degree sound. IPX7 waterproof rating for outdoor use. 10-hour battery life and built-in microphone for calls.

products.ProductTitle: PopSocket Wallet Grip - Card Holder & Phone Stand
products.Description: PopSocket wallet grip with card holder slots. Secure grip for texting and selfies. Repositionable and works as a kickstand.

products.ProductTitle: Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds - TWS with Charging Case
products.Description: True wireless earbuds with premium sound. Long battery life and comfortable fit. Perfect for music and calls.

products.ProductTitle: Portable Bluetooth Speaker with Mobile Stand - Mini MOT
products.Description: Dual-purpose portable speaker with built-in phone stand. Great sound and hands-free viewing. Perfect for desk and travel.

products.shortTitle: Smartphone Ring Light with Tripod Stand
products.ProductTitle: Smartphone Ring Light with Tripod Stand for Streaming & Photography
products.Description: LED ring light with adjustable tripod. Perfect for selfies, video calls, and content creation. Multiple brightness levels.

products.ProductTitle: 360° Rotating Ring Stand Mobile Back Cover
products.Description: Durable mobile case with built-in 360° rotating ring holder for better grip and hands-free viewing.

products.ProductTitle: Anti-Fingerprint Matte Frosted Mobile Case
products.Description: Slim matte finish case with anti-fingerprint coating for clean look and premium feel.

products.ProductTitle: Trendy Summer Floral Print Mobile Case
products.Description: Stylish floral print case designed for summer vibes. Lightweight, protective and fashionable.

products.ProductTitle: Premium Genuine Leather Flip Cover Case
products.Description: Elegant leather flip case offering full body protection with card slots and magnetic lock.

products.ProductTitle: 120W GaN Fast Charger for All Devices
products.Description: Ultra-fast 120W GaN charger compatible with smartphones, tablets, and laptops. Compact design with high efficiency power delivery.

products.ProductTitle: 15W Qi2 Certified Wireless Charging Pad
products.Description: High-speed 15W wireless charging pad with Qi2 certification. Slim design and safe charging protection.

products.ProductTitle: MagSafe Magnetic Fast Charger
products.Description: Magnetic alignment for seamless charging experience. Supports fast charging for compatible devices.

products.ProductTitle: Eco-Friendly Solar Power Charger
products.Description: Portable solar charger with eco-friendly power generation. Ideal for outdoor travel and emergency backup charging.

products.ProductTitle: Bone Conduction Wireless Headphones with Open-Ear Technology
products.Description: Advanced open-ear bone conduction headphones that deliver premium sound while keeping you aware of your surroundings.

products.ProductTitle: Pro ANC Wireless Earbuds with Active Noise Cancellation
products.Description: Premium earbuds with active noise cancellation technology, crystal clear calls, and immersive sound experience.

products.ProductTitle: Bass Boost TWS Earbuds with 40 Hours Battery Life
products.Description: Powerful bass earbuds with extended 40-hour battery backup, fast charging support, and ergonomic design.

products.ProductTitle: Sports Wireless Earbuds with IPX7 Waterproof Rating
products.Description: IPX7 waterproof sports earbuds designed for workouts, running, and outdoor activities with secure fit design.

products.ProductTitle: 20000mAh Ultra Power Bank with 65W Fast Charging
products.Description: High-capacity 20000mAh power bank with 65W fast charging support. Ideal for laptops, smartphones, and tablets.

products.ProductTitle: 10000mAh Slim Power Bank with Credit Card Thin Design
products.Description: Ultra-slim 10000mAh power bank with compact design. Easy to carry in pocket and perfect for daily travel use.

products.ProductTitle: MagSafe 5000mAh Wireless + Wired Combo Power Bank
products.Description: Compact 5000mAh MagSafe power bank with wireless and wired charging combo. Perfect for iPhone and compatible devices.

products.ProductTitle: Solar 30000mAh Eco-Friendly High Capacity Power Bank
products.Description: Massive 30000mAh solar power bank with eco charging support. Perfect for outdoor travel, camping, and emergency backup.

products.ProductTitle: GT4 Pro Smart Watch with AMOLED Always-On Display
products.Description: Premium smartwatch featuring AMOLED always-on display, fitness tracking, heart rate monitoring and smart notifications.

products.ProductTitle: Advanced Health Tracker Smart Watch with ECG & Blood Oxygen Monitor
products.Description: Smart health tracking watch with ECG monitoring, blood oxygen sensor, sleep analysis and multi-sport modes.

products.ProductTitle: Kids Smart Watch with GPS Tracking & SOS Emergency Calling
products.Description: Smartwatch for kids with real-time GPS tracking, SOS emergency button, calling feature and parental control support.

products.ProductTitle: Outdoor GPS Smart Watch with Topo Maps & Altimeter
products.Description: Rugged outdoor smartwatch with GPS navigation, topographic maps, altimeter, compass and long battery life.

products.ProductTitle: Car Phone Mount - MagSafe Dashboard Holder
products.Description: Strong magnetic MagSafe car phone mount for dashboard use. Secure grip with 360° rotation for easy viewing while driving.

products.ProductTitle: 360° Universal Ring Grip Stand for Smartphones
products.Description: Premium 360° rotating ring grip stand. Provides secure hold and doubles as a kickstand for hands-free viewing.

products.ProductTitle: Adjustable Arm Desk Stand Pro for Mobile Phones
products.Description: Heavy-duty adjustable desk stand with flexible arm. Perfect for video calls, streaming, and hands-free multitasking.

products.ProductTitle: Bike Phone Mount - Anti-Shake Clamp Holder
products.Description: Durable anti-shake bike phone mount with strong clamp grip. Ideal for cycling, mountain biking, and long rides.
